profil.subtitlu: The first important step — fill in all your business details.
pasi: 📝 Add your business name — it appears on the public booking page
🔗 Set your unique slug (e.g. salon-maria) — this generates your personal link and QR code for online bookings
📞 Add the contact phone and email — these belong to the person responsible for the app
🖼️ Upload your business logo — it appears on the booking page and in the app
📍 Add the address — clients will see it on the booking page so they know where to come
profil.tip: The slug is essential — without it the booking link and QR code cannot be generated! The contact details belong to the person responsible and can be used in an emergency.

settings.subtitlu: Configure your working hours and availability.
pasi: 🕐 Set working hours for each day of the week — e.g. Mon–Fri 09:00–18:00
🚫 Mark closed days (e.g. Sunday) — these show with a red background in the Calendar
🔗 Generate the public booking link and QR code from this page
⛔ You can manually block certain hours when you're not punctually available
📱 Test the booking link on your phone to make sure everything works correctly
settings.tip: Without working hours set, all time slots appear available! Days marked as closed show with a red background in the Calendar (Day, Week and Month views) and cannot be booked online.

resurse.subtitlu: Add your team and the services each of them offers.
pasi: 👨‍💼 Add each specialist with their full name (and optionally phone/email for notifications)
✂️ Create the services offered — fill in the price and duration for each
🔗 Link each specialist to the services they offer — this automatically filters the options when booking
⏱️ The service duration automatically blocks the calendar slot and prevents overlaps
💰 Price and duration generate detailed productivity and profit reports per specialist
resurse.tip: The specialist–service link is essential! When creating an appointment, the system only shows specialists who offer the chosen service, and vice versa. Duration and price are used for productivity reports.

programari.subtitlu: This is where you create new appointments and manage existing ones.
pasi: ➕ Fill in the client's details (name, phone, email) — they're automatically saved to the client's file
👨‍💼 Choose the specialist and the service they offer — the list filters automatically based on the links you set
📅 Select the date and time — the system automatically blocks the chosen specialist's busy hours
📎 You can attach documents, images, audio or video relevant to the appointment
✅ Created appointments automatically appear in the Calendar and in the client's file on the Clients page
programari.tip: You can add multiple services for the same client in the same session — each with its own specialist and time! If two different specialists are available at the same time, both appointments are allowed.

calendar.subtitlu: View, edit and organize all your appointments.
pasi: 📆 Switch between Day, Week, Month or Year — each view has its own advantages
🕐 In Day view: hours within working hours have a white background, hours outside have a striped gray background — easy to tell apart
🚫 Closed days (set in Settings) show with a red background in both Week and Month views
👨‍💼 Filter by specialist or service to see each one's schedule separately
✏️ Click any appointment to edit, move it or add documents
calendar.tip: Multiple specialists can have appointments at the same time — each has their own separate schedule! Busy hours are blocked per specialist, not per day.

clienti.subtitlu: The complete archive and file for every client.
pasi: 🔄 Clients are automatically saved from appointments based on phone number — no need to add them manually
📁 Every client has a complete file: appointment history, work performed and attached files
📎 You can attach files, images, audio or video to each client's file (e.g. before/after photos, recipes, specifications)
🔧 The Work section automatically calculates material cost, profit and margin per client
🔍 Quickly search by name, phone or email
clienti.tip: The client's file updates automatically with every new appointment! Documents attached to appointments also appear in the client's file.

abonamente.subtitlu: Choose the right plan — and when to activate your trial.
pasi: ⚠️ Activate the 10-day trial ONLY after you've fully set up: Profile, Settings, Services and Specialists
🎁 The trial gives you access to the Team plan (unlimited) for 10 days — don't waste it on setup
📊 Free: 30 appt/month · Pro: 150 · Elite: 500 · Team: unlimited
💬 The Elite and Team plans include automatic WhatsApp messages to clients and specialists
🔓 The booking link, QR code and advanced reports are available from the Pro plan
abonamente.tip: Don't activate the trial before setting up the app — otherwise you'll waste precious days out of the 10! Set everything up first, then activate.

rapoarte.subtitlu: Monitor your business performance in real time.
pasi: 📈 See the number of appointments per day, week or month
💰 Analyze revenue and profit per service and per specialist
⭐ Track the rate of online vs. in-person bookings
📉 Identify the days and hours with the highest activity to optimize your schedule
🔧 Reports are more detailed if you've set the price and duration for each service in Manage Services
rapoarte.tip: The more accurately service prices and durations are set, the more relevant your productivity and profit reports become!

pasi: ⭐ See all reviews left by clients through the public booking page
➕ You can manually add reviews from loyal clients who didn't leave feedback online
📈 The more positive reviews you have, the more new clients your booking page attracts
💬 Reviews are visible on your business's public booking page
🌟 The average review score influences new clients' trust in your business
sugestii.tip: Ask satisfied clients to leave a review after every visit — every star counts toward attracting new clients!

contacteUtile.subtitlu: Your directory of professional and emergency contacts.
pasi: 🏭 Save supplier phone numbers for products and materials for quick orders
🔧 Add contacts for technicians, installers, partners or collaborators
⚡ Quick access in emergencies — breakdowns, malfunctions, urgent supplies
📋 This page is separate from clients — clients are found automatically on the Clients page
👤 You can also save the details of the person responsible for the app here for quick emergency contact
contacteUtile.tip: Useful contacts are for your professional suppliers and partners — not for clients! Clients are saved automatically from appointments on their dedicated page.

hero.subtitle: The complete management platform for salons, clinics, workshops and any appointment-based business. Calendar, clients, documents, reports and online bookings — all in one place.
hero.disclaimer: * No card. No commitment. Just results.

features.subtitle: Every module was built for real businesses

items.desc: Day, Week, Month and Year views. Working hours are visually distinct from off-hours. Closed days appear with a different background. Filter by specialist or service.
A unique personal link and QR code for your business. Clients pick their own available time. The system automatically blocks busy hours per specialist. No overlaps, no confusion.
A complete file for every client: appointment history, work performed, per-job profit calculator, attached files (images, video, audio, PDF documents). Updates automatically.
Define services with price and duration. Link each specialist to the services they offer. When booking, the system automatically filters options and locks the right calendar slot.
Track the number of appointments, revenue and profit per specialist and service. Identify the hours and days with the highest activity. The more complete the data, the more precise the reports.
Attach any file type to each appointment: PDF, images, audio, video. Documents sync automatically to the client's file. Useful for prescriptions, technical specs, notes or visual references.
Clients can leave reviews through the public booking page. You can manually add reviews from loyal clients. The average score is visible on your public page and builds trust with new clients.
A separate directory for suppliers, partners and collaborators. Quick access to important numbers in emergencies. Completely separate from the client database.

Available on the Elite and Team plans. Send automatic confirmations and reminders to clients on WhatsApp. Straight from the app, with one click, personalized with the client's name and appointment details.

steps.heading: GET STARTED IN
steps.subtitle: From zero to an organized business in under an hour

items.desc: Add your business name, unique slug, phone, address and logo. The slug generates your personal link and QR code for online bookings.
Define working hours for each day, mark closed days, and add services with their price and duration. Link each specialist to their services.
Send the link or QR code to your clients. They book themselves, the system confirms automatically, and the appointment appears instantly in your calendar.
Follow your activity reports, manage client files and optimize your schedule based on real data from the app.

pricing.heading: TRANSPARENT
pricing.subtitle: Activate the trial after you've fully set up the app — you won't lose a single day
pricing.ctaNote: No card. No commitment. Activate once everything is set up.

finalCta.paragraph: Complete your profile, set your schedule, add services and specialists — and you're ready to receive online bookings. Activate the trial once you've finished setup so you don't lose a day.
finalCta.note: No card. No commitment. No messages at 11pm.

footer.description: The complete management platform for appointment-based businesses. Calendar, clients, documents, reports and online bookings.

insights.teamLoadHighSuggestion: A high workload — it might be worth checking if the team needs reinforcement.
insights.teamLoadLowSuggestion: There's room for more appointments — you could invest in promotion to attract new clients.

cookiesModal.title: Cookie
cookiesModal.text1: We only use technical cookies, necessary to keep you logged into your account.
cookiesModal.text2: We do not use cookies for advertising or commercial tracking.
cookiesModal.text3: These cookies are essential for the app to function and expire automatically when you log out.
cookiesModal.contactLabel: Questions about cookies? Write to us at

termeniModal.title: Terms &
termeniModal.text1: By using the Chronos platform, you agree to our operating rules.
termeniModal.text2: The system is designed for the efficient management of time and professional resources.
termeniModal.text3: The user is responsible for the accuracy of the information entered in the calendar.
termeniModal.text4: We reserve the right to update these terms; continued use of the platform after changes constitutes acceptance of them.
termeniModal.contactLabel: Questions about the terms? Write to us at

gdprModal.title: Privacy
gdprModal.text1: Protecting your data is a priority in the Chronos system.
gdprModal.text2: We collect the minimum data necessary for the booking service to function and to secure your account.
gdprModal.text3: We do not sell your data and we use secure infrastructure for storage.
gdprModal.text4: You have the right to request access to, correction of, or deletion of your personal data at any time.
gdprModal.contactLabel: For requests regarding personal data, write to us at
